examples: Much education today is monumentally ineffective.
Monumentally researched, comprehensively detailed and profusely illustrated.
So rather than giving 100% to one task at a time you are going back and forth between tasks, giving each task a monumentally less amount of focus.
At this juncture, the comparatively meager sacrifices that have been offered underscore a monumentally flawed strategy.
That might have made him especially eager to catch up with his superiors--and receptive to what, in retrospect, was a monumentally stupid idea.
